name: IRCTC SBI Platinum Card
exclusions: railway ticket bookings outside eligible IRCTC channels
airline, hotel and holiday bookings through IRCTC for accelerated railway benefits
transactions excluded under IRCTC SBI Platinum Card terms
milestoneBenefits: 500 Reward Points on payment of renewal fee
additionalBenefits: 350 activation bonus Reward Points on a single transaction of Rs 500 or more within 60 days of card issuance
Up to 10% value back as Reward Points on eligible AC1, AC2, AC3, Executive Chair Car and Chair Car railway ticket bookings through IRCTC
1 Reward Point per Rs 125 on eligible non-fuel retail purchases, including eligible railway ticket purchases
1 Reward Point equals Re 1 for eligible IRCTC redemption
Save 1% transaction charges on eligible railway ticket bookings on IRCTC
4 complimentary railway lounge visits per year in India, capped at 1 per quarter
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions, capped at Rs 100 per month
